title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account, integrations and preferences.
bio_default: Backend engineer. Solving kata every day.
theme_dark_only_note: Dark theme — B/W aesthetic across web / Hone / Cue. Light theme is not supported.

telegram.unlinked: Link your account to receive pings in Telegram.
telegram.instructions: Open @druz9_bot in Telegram and send /start — pings will start arriving to your account.

yandex.unlinked: OAuth linking is available on the sign-in page.

notifications_card.title: Notifications
notifications_card.description: Toggle channels — the switch saves immediately. The Telegram channel works only when a Telegram account is linked (see Integrations).
notifications_card.save_failed: Could not save — please try again.

ai_coach.title: AI Coach — model
ai_coach.description: Pick the LLM that generates the weekly insight. Empty ⇒ the default free model. Premium models require a paid subscription.
ai_coach.load_failed: Could not load the model catalogue
ai_coach.unavailable: AI Coach is currently disabled (OPENROUTER_API_KEY missing)
ai_coach.default_desc: server picks the model for your tier

privacy_card.title: Privacy
privacy_card.description_html: Your profile is visible only to members of your circles and opponents in matches. You can manually publish anonymous report links from <1>/profile/weekly</1>.
privacy_card.footnote_html: Data is stored in RU; Redis cache clears 24 hours after sign-out. Full export and deletion live in <1>the Danger zone</1>.

analytics.title: Product analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous usage events help prioritise features. No PII. Toggle off anytime — pending events are dropped from memory immediately.
analytics.opt_in_label: Share anonymous usage events to improve druz9
analytics.delete_confirm: Delete ALL your analytics events irreversibly?

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Account deletion is irreversible. Notes, progress, mock sessions and subscriptions are wiped. External subscriptions (legacy Boosty etc.) remain — cancel those separately.
danger.delete_confirm: Really delete the account? All data will be erased irreversibly.
danger.username_mismatch: Type your username exactly to confirm.
